title: Semi Realistic Space Exploration Modpack
description:
explore planets and moons with the create and ad Astra mod!

you can explore all different types of planets even ones from other solar systems!

not only that you can also create all different things using create.
body:
NOTICE: please read the description.

a modpack that allows you to explore space in minecraft, have fun!
explore planets and moons with the create and ad Astra mod, and the most realistic skies I could get in minecraft!

I completely overhauled the world generation now you have a diverse world to explore,
I added seasons that affect crop growth adding more challenge,
you can explore all different types of planets even ones from other solar systems,
not only that you can also create all different things using create and farmers Delight!


NOTICE: all gallery images are removed do to one of the main mods (astrocraft) updating and new gallery images will be uploaded soon, if you dont care about how the sky looks that much and you just want the most content then download 2.5.5, 2.5.5 is also the version the removed images were taken.

Smaller new update.
